name: medialane-backend
description: Medialane off-chain service layer for Starknet

scripts.db:start: docker compose -f db-mock/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const fallback='postgresql://medialane:medialane@localhost:5432/medialane_dev?schema=public'; const url=process.env.DATABASE_URL || fallback; console.log('Postgres container is running (created if missing, started if existing).'); console.log('Use this in your .env:'); console.log('DATABASE_URL=\"' + url + '\"');"
scripts.db:seed: bunx prisma db push && node db-mock/seed.cjs
